texto: Some days, my life flashes before me in the blink of an eye, until I get to the scenes I wish I could change, and they play over again and again, until I can't see straight. Promise me though, you'll stop pouring every ounce of yourself into work. Save a part of your life for something else.
explicacao: Citação de Rebecca Raisin sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Some days, my life flashes before me in the blink of an eye, until I get to the scenes I wish I c…” articula vida, life-lessons, love em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e trabalho.

frase_original: Some days, my life flashes before me in the blink of an eye, until I get to the scenes I wish I could change, and they play over again and again, until I can't see straight. Promise me though, you'll stop pouring every ounce of yourself into work. Save a part of your life for something else.

texto: Regret is such a miserable word. But there have been plenty of times alone, where I wished I took the risk and gave someone my heart, and not just a sliver of it. After one stumble, you've pulled the shutters down. Closed up shop. I'm just saying, don't waste your life protecting your heart, or you'll get to the end of it and realize it wasn't worth it.
explicacao: Citação de Rebecca Raisin sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Regret is such a miserable word. But there have been plenty of times alone, where I wished I took…” articula amor, life-lessons, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e love.

After one stumble, you've pulled the shutters down. Closed up shop. I'm just saying, don't waste your life protecting your heart, or you'll get to the end of it and realize it wasn't worth it.

texto: I chose to remain single because I couldn't commit to one person. But it isn't easy. There are plenty of times when I wonder if I made a huge mistake with some of the men I've loved and let go. Maybe I would have enjoyed love, after the dizzying rapture faded, and was replaced with something more fulsome? Truer, deeper? But I never gave it a chance. And that might have been a huge mistake...
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Rebecca Raisin que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “I chose to remain single because I couldn't commit to one person. But it isn't easy. There are pl…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, life-lessons, love, com foco em love.
